Have you ever been? 😊

pinned_places: Dunedin has easily become one of my favorite pretty little towns in Florida! 😍 It really has something for everyone!

transcription.text: This might just be the prettiest little town in Florida. If you're looking for a Florida town with a great downtown area, amazing food scene, excellent craft cocktail bars and local breweries that's close to beaches and is super dog friendly, Dunedin is it. Dunedin is located on the west coast of Florida, about 40 minutes from Tampa. Dunedin has so much to offer and is well known for its close proximity to Honeymoon Island that you can drive to and Kaladesi Island that you can take a ferry to or kayak to. The craft cocktail bars and local breweries are plentiful and really impressed me. The downtown area is very walkable with lots of shops, restaurants and bars. The town is extremely dog friendly and even has been nicknamed Dog Eden. So if you're looking for a place to visit with your pup, this is definitely it. There's an art district here and the murals are absolutely incredible. I spent hours walking around looking at them. One popular thing to do is rent a bike and ride the Pinellas Bike Trail that runs through the heart of downtown Dunedin. There are breweries and restaurants lining the bike trail that you can stop off at and I thought that was so cool. Send this to a friend you would want to visit here with and follow along for more great Florida content from a local.
